message:
style: apply rustfmt import ordering and formatting across GUI, client, SSH, window, mux crates

Purely mechanical formatting changes with no behavioral impact:
- Alphabetical import reordering (items before modules) across all crates
- Suppress unused JoinHandle warnings with let _ = std::thread::spawn()
  in glyphcache, stats, and ossl
- Reorder struct field initialization to match declaration order in
  glyphcache (DecodedFrame)
- Collapse split #[derive] attribute in mux-lua/src/lib.rs
- Fix indentation of GlState::create in macos/window.rs
- Reformat ternary-style if/else into block form in x11/window.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
